response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack software craftsman with deep web, mobile, and embedded experience, but the role requires Principal-level expertise in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware, deep learning workload optimization, and hardware-software co-design. The resume shows no GPU/SIMD/MIMD architecture work, no DNN training/inference optimization, and no silicon or accelerator performance analysis. Low-latency DLang work at Sociomantic and some C/C++ at National Instruments are the closest adjacencies, but they are too far removed from chip-level performance architecture to justify a Principal IC hire.
strengths: Long track record of senior/staff IC roles with low-latency systems experience (DLang, async I/O, fibers)
Some C/C++ background from National Instruments on engineering measurement tooling
Strong software craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, testability) useful in modeling work
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, or AI accelerator hardware experience
No deep learning training/inference optimization or DNN workload analysis background
Profile is web/full-stack focused; lacks hardware-software co-design and system architecture at silicon level

key_factors.factor: Missing SoC/IP modeling and accelerator hardware background
No DNN / GPU / SIMD-MIMD performance optimization experience
